allow: Bash(python -c "import py_compile; import glob; errors=[]; [errors.append\(f\) for f in glob.glob\(''backend/src/**/*.py'', recursive=True\) if not \(lambda f: \(py_compile.compile\(f, doraise=True\), True\)[1] if True else False\)\(f\)]; print\(''All Python files compile OK'' if not errors else errors\)")
